attrs.content: This is the opening paragraph of a fairly typical WordPress post that has been imported into GoNext. It introduces the topic in plain prose.
A short list of things I learned

values: Block trees are easier to reason about than freeform HTML.
Test coverage on importers pays for itself in week one.

attrs.content: Here is a quote that captures the sentiment nicely:

attrs.citation: An importer that knew what it was doing
attrs.value: The best time to convert your content was yesterday; the second-best time is during a migration.

attrs.content: The best time to convert your content was yesterday; the second-best time is during a migration.
That's the end of the post.
